title: Anthistiria hispida

intro: Anthistiria hispida is a species of grass, commonly known as the hairy bristle grass, which belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments.
